creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
edwin       2007-09-23 04:42:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/dvd-slideshow Makefile 
    multimedia/dvd-slideshow/files patch-dvd-slideshow 
  Log:
  multimedia/dvd-slideshow has incorrect path for LSOF
  
          dvd-slideshow script uses "/usr/bin/lsof" instead of "/usr/local/sbin/lsof" for LSOF
  
  Also fixes seq/seq2 confusion
  
  PR:             ports/116031
  Submitted by:   "User1001" <supraexpress@globaleyes.net>
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.12      +1 -1      ports/multimedia/dvd-slideshow/Makefile
  1.4       +124 -2    ports/multimedia/dvd-slideshow/files/patch-dvd-slideshow
